body.title: PROC_WORKER_FOREMAN: add schedule_interval_sec so queue is scanned without worker_done trigger
body.result: Added schedule_interval_sec=120 to PROC_WORKER_FOREMAN metadata in clan.memories — SchedulerSource now fires queue scan every 2 min without needing a worker_done trigger
body.description:
PROC_WORKER_FOREMAN is trigger='worker_done' only — no scheduled scan. When no worker is running, the ticket pickup chain never fires (boredom path is blocked by arousal > 0.08). Add schedule_interval_sec=120 to PROC_WORKER_FOREMAN metadata so SchedulerSource fires check_worker_queue every 2 minutes autonomously.

**Affected files:** clan.memories (PROC_WORKER_FOREMAN habit metadata — UPDATE via psql)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite, palace-first
**Scope boundary:** Only the PROC_WORKER_FOREMAN habit metadata UPDATE. No code changes.
**Test plan:** After update, observe SCHEDULER_TICK entries in TWM within 2 minutes; verify Igor adopts a goal.
